selections.name: Brooke's Blooms
selections.reason: Impressive winner at her only trial. Should get all the favours from this good gate.

selections.name: Catfish
selections.reason: Has race experience and ability. Can get off the mark this time from the inside draw.

selections.name: Profit In Paradise
selections.reason: Trialled well recently and has the benefit of race experience.

selections.name: Inch By Inch
selections.reason: Has three recent trials leading into debut. Shapes as a leading prospect.

danger_horse.name: Portnova
danger_horse.reason: Runner-up in her only public trial. Prefer to see but has claims.

selections.name: Harry's Mode
selections.reason: Promising on debut and returned from a break with a solid 3rd. Fitter and worth following up.

selections.name: Prestige Austria
selections.reason: Well-supported at debut and ran 3rd in the wet. Well in commission that day so the effort came as no surprise.

selections.name: Tommy Tie
selections.reason: Resuming after a six months break. Expected to feature from the inside draw.

selections.name: Karai Martini
selections.reason: Scored in a recent Gold Coast trial. Monitor market moves for this debutant.

danger_horse.name: Flying Scarlett
danger_horse.reason: Coming along well at the trials with a minor placing at her most recent.

selections.name: Norty Forty
selections.reason: Drops significantly in class after contesting the G1 Qld Oaks. Won prior to that in heavy going.

selections.name: Lyneham
selections.reason: Consistent performer who has been runner-up in his last two starts. Looms as a genuine threat.

selections.name: Pink Vixen
selections.reason: Edged out late last start on a slow track. Nice effort last time and is a leading prospect.

selections.name: Krumac
selections.reason: Tracked the speed and boxed on steadily last start. Won prior to that. Can figure.

danger_horse.name: Amazigh Torque
danger_horse.reason: Won last start on a rain-affected track. Confidence is high.

selections.name: Kojak
selections.reason: Second run from a spell, sat on the pace when 3rd on a wet track last start. Sure to be a major player.

selections.name: Argentum Rock
selections.reason: Sat on the speed and boxed on steadily for 4th last start on rain-affected going. Finds a nice race.

selections.name: Bomb Perignon
selections.reason: 2nd in a small field on a wet track last start. Hard to beat if she brings her A-game.

selections.name: Rainbow Glitter
selections.reason: Ran 5th last start on rain-affected going. Can improve in this field.

danger_horse.name: Rotate
danger_horse.reason: Crossed from a wide gate to settle just off the pace last start. Can improve and is worth thought.

selections.name: Notabadjackup
selections.reason: Won by a head at this track last start. Sure to prove hard to beat again.

selections.name: San Jose Boy
selections.reason: Won by 1.75 len at this track last start on a soft track. Will prove very tough to beat again.

selections.name: Easy Love
selections.reason: Consistent type who ran 3rd last start. Nice effort last time so worth following up.

selections.name: Forty Times
selections.reason: Ran 2nd two starts back. Can atone for a modest effort last time from the inside draw.

danger_horse.name: Vermeer
danger_horse.reason: Second run back. Came home strongly from last on the turn previously. Expect improvement.

selections.name: Sense Of Duty
selections.reason: At debut, 2nd on a wet track just missing out. Well placed to get off the mark.

selections.name: Bassett's Choice
selections.reason: Ran 2nd last start on a slow track. Can improve again and is a strong chance.

selections.name: Indamouse
selections.reason: Returned from break and ran 2nd last start. Likely to measure up again with a repeat performance.

selections.name: Captivate Legend
selections.reason: Third-up today. Capable of sharp improvement after two runs back.

danger_horse.name: Silent Thinker
danger_horse.reason: First start. By leading sire So You Think out of Secret Silence. Watch betting.

selections.name: Dialidae
selections.reason: Second-up. Sat on the pace when 2nd at this track last start. Can only be further improved.

selections.name: Ciphertext
selections.reason: Sat on the pace when 3rd at this track last start. Expected to go well again.

selections.name: The Rookie
selections.reason: Set the pace for much of the race when 2nd last start. Genuine galloper and is one of the better hopes.

selections.name: Rose Noir
selections.reason: Resuming. Has ability and can feature fresh from the inside draw.

danger_horse.name: Miss Force
danger_horse.reason: Has won previously first-up and resumes here. Can run a race while fresh.

selections.name: Ready To Drink
selections.reason: Came home strongly to win last start. Better than the last run suggests and can feature in the finish.

selections.name: Bow Tie Affair
selections.reason: Drops in class after running 7th last start. Capable of better in this grade.

selections.name: Notes
selections.reason: Ran 3rd two starts back on a slow track. Hard to beat on his best form.

selections.name: Weekend Artist
selections.reason: Won a recent trial. Made headway last time and finds a nice race here.

danger_horse.name: Captain Insano
danger_horse.reason: Can improve on recent efforts. Watch for a better showing.

selections.name: Bruckheimer
selections.reason: Made some head-way from midfield to finish 2nd last start. Well placed and should be in the finish.

selections.name: Swing State
selections.reason: Won by a head last start in soft going. Well placed in this company and looks the testing material again.

selections.name: Golden Mikki
selections.reason: Ran 2nd two starts back. Tough to beat on his best form.

selections.name: Toolatemate
selections.reason: Consistent type who ran 5th on a heavy track last start. Can figure in the finish.

danger_horse.name: Launcher
danger_horse.reason: Can bounce back from a poor showing last start. Has the inside draw.
